positive: A minimalist, high-contrast illustration featuring a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The composition should be centered, showing three distinct peaks of varying heights. Above the mountains, depict a crescent moon and a small group of highly stylized, geometric stars. The sky gradient should transition smoothly from deep indigo at the top to warm tangerine near the horizon line. Use clean, bold lines and a limited, earthy color palette (deep blues, ochre yellow, burnt orange). Perfect for apparel printing, vector art quality, sticker design style, strong contrast, clean silhouette, flat graphic style.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, messy, grainy, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, people, photorealistic, cinematic, complex background details
